title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable now - Ask [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Location permission flow in Find My Device does not show expected Allow options when permission is set to Ask Next Time during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
4. Reach the 'Organized' screen in the onboarding flow.
6. When the location permission dialog appears, tap 'Don't Allow'.
8. Log in or continue as guest.
9. Open the Poly Lens menu by tapping the hamburger icon (☰).
11. Tap 'Enable now' for Find My Device.
12. Set the Location Services permission to 'Ask Next Time or When I Share'.
expected: Permission dialogs appear at appropriate steps with correct options: 'Allow Once', 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't Allow' on Android.
